title: Silly's Crossbow Fix
description: This mod fixes a bug/issue that has existed since 1.15.2 with Crossbows
body:
**Silly's Crossbow Fix**

A **lightweight**, **client-side** mod that fixes a longstanding bug in Minecraft where players remain slowed down after reloading a crossbow, even after it is fully charged until right-click is released. This mod ensures player speed returns to normal immediately after the crossbow finishes charging, without requiring input release.

Requires with Fabric loader
Minecraft versions **1.21-1.21.8**

## **Planned features:**
- Automatic reloading (Toggleable)
- Toggle-to-reload functionality (Toggleable)
  
## **Feedback**
Have suggestions or found an issue??

Contact me on discord (Discord id: **gwabgwab**) or open an issue on [Github](https://github.com/sillygoober2/Sillys-Crossbow-Fix)
